About Our Company

Manufacturer & Exporter of Power & Distribution Transformers

Qorasuv Elektr Sifat is a pioneering ISO 9001 certified manufacturer and exporter of Power & Distribution Transformers up to 10MVA, 33kV class, and customized transformers, based in Tashkent, Uzbekistan.

Our technical expertise and engineering precision ensure every unit meets the highest standards of performance and reliability for industrial, commercial, and utility clients.

Who We Are

About Qorasuv Elektr Sifat

Trusted transformer manufacturer based in Tashkent, Uzbekistan

Home / About Us

Manufacturer & Exporter of Power & Distribution Transformers

Qorasuv Elektr Sifat (QES) is a pioneering ISO 9001 certified manufacturer and exporter of Power & Distribution Transformers up to 10MVA, 33kV class, and customized transformers, based in Tashkent, Uzbekistan.

Founded by experienced engineers and technocrats, QES has established itself as a trusted name delivering reliable, high-efficiency transformer solutions for industrial, commercial, and utility clients across Uzbekistan and international markets.

Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facility is equipped with the latest machinery and testing equipment to ensure every transformer leaving our factory meets the highest quality standards.

What drives us

Our Core Values

Quality First

Every transformer is built to ISO 9001 standards with rigorous testing at each stage of production.

Customer Focus

We work closely with each client to understand their specific needs and deliver tailored solutions.

Sustainability

Our energy-efficient designs reduce power losses and support a greener industrial future.

Innovation

Continuous R&D ensures our products incorporate the latest advancements in transformer technology.

Global Reach

Exporting to multiple countries with full compliance to international standards and certifications.

Reliability

Our transformers are engineered for long service life and minimal maintenance requirements.

What We Make

Our Transformer Products

High-quality power transformers for every industrial application

Home / Products
Oil

Oil Immersed Power & Distribution Transformers

ONAN/ONAF/OFWF cooled, single/three phase, 50/60 Hz Aluminium/Copper wound, continuous duty transformers for industrial and utility use.

Capacity: 5 KVA to 10,000 KVA
Voltage Class: Up to 33 kV
Cooling: ONAN / ONAF / OFWF
Standard: IEC / GOST
Distribution

Distribution Transformers

Multiple-unit production runs for utility companies and large industrial clients. Ready for immediate delivery across Uzbekistan and export markets.

Capacity: 25 KVA to 2,500 KVA
Phase: Single / Three Phase
Frequency: 50 / 60 Hz
Application: Utility / Industrial
Power

Large Power Transformers

Heavy-duty transformers for substations, mining operations, and large industrial power systems. Crane-assisted installation supported.

Capacity: 1 MVA to 10 MVA
Voltage Class: Up to 35 kV
Cooling: ONAN / OFWF
Design: Custom per project
Panels

Electrical Switchgear & Panels

Complete MV/LV switchgear panels, distribution boards, and control panels for transformer substations and industrial distribution systems.

Types: MV / LV Switchgear
Voltage: Up to 35 kV
Enclosure: IP54 / Custom
Standard: IEC 62271

Need a custom transformer?

What We Offer

Our Services

End-to-end transformer services from manufacturing to maintenance

Home / Services
Full lifecycle support

How We Support Your Operations

Manufacturing

State-of-the-art in-house manufacturing of power and distribution transformers to exact customer specifications.

Installation & Commissioning

On-site installation, commissioning, and startup testing by our qualified field engineering team.

Repair & Rewinding

Complete transformer repair, rewinding, and refurbishment services to extend the life of your existing units.

Testing & Diagnostics

Comprehensive routine and type tests including oil BDV, winding resistance, turns ratio, and load/no-load loss tests.

Annual Maintenance

Scheduled preventive maintenance programs to ensure maximum uptime and reliability of your transformer fleet.

Technical Consultancy

Expert guidance on transformer selection, system design, energy efficiency optimization, and regulatory compliance.

Need a service quote?

Global Reach

Export

Delivering quality transformers to international markets

Home / Export

Exporting Excellence: Transformers for International Markets

Qorasuv Elektr Sifat exports Power & Distribution Transformers to clients across Central Asia, the Middle East, and beyond. Our transformers comply with international standards including IEC, GOST, and BS.

We have a dedicated export team to handle all documentation, packaging, and logistics to ensure safe and timely delivery anywhere in the world.

All export units undergo additional pre-shipment testing and inspection as per customer and country-specific requirements.
